_comment: Static work assignments per machine hostname. Run `hostname` to get your machine's id.

_timing_notes.split_rationale: M4 takes Q=2..7 (50 slopes, ~49 min), M1 takes Q=8..10 (32 slopes, ~45 min). Both finish in ~49 min.

tasks._note: 74 slopes: Q=2..7, |P|≤10 — 54 ℓ=2 + 20 ℓ=3 x96s each. ETA ~49 min.
Run after qq=50 kernels are done and merged.

SNU-CTPs-MacBook-Pro.local.name: M1 Mac (8 workers)
SNU-CTPs-MacBook-Pro.local._setup: brew install python@3.12 && cd v0.4 && python3.12 -m pip install -e . && ./run.sh

tasks._note: 32 slopes: Q=8..10, |P|≤10 — 16 ℓ=2 + 16 ℓ=3 x144s each. ETA ~45 min.
